text: We perform three 1 cm ports incision.
A 4 cm utility incision without rib spreading is performed in the 4th intercostal space anteriorly.
After dividing the pulmonary ligament, dissection proceed isolating the lower and upper pulmonary vein.
dividing inferior and superior pulmonary vein first facilitate the exposure and isolation of the main pulmonary artery.
All vessels were resected using a 30 mm vascular stapler.
At the end of the procedure we isolated and divided the main left bronchus with a 45 mm stapler.
we were able to remove the lung from the utility incision with an endocatch.
After removing the lung, we performed mediastinal lymphadenectomy.
